site.name: CosHub
site.description: CosHub is a platform for collecting and showcasing high-quality cosplay photo sets, with multilingual browsing and content rating filters.

hero.title: Discover Breathtaking
hero.subtitle: Curated high-quality cosplay photo sets from around the world. From sweet to bold, find your aesthetic.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Browse all curated collections
gallery.search: Search by name, character or cosplayer...
gallery.nsfwHiddenDesc: NSFW display is currently off. Toggle NSFW in the header to browse all content.

detail.ageWarning: This gallery contains adult content. Please confirm you are 18 or older.
detail.membersOnlyDesc: This gallery is exclusive to subscribers. Subscribe to view and download for free.

payment.description: Pay to access the full gallery content

payment.failedDesc: Something went wrong with the payment. Please try again.

nsfw.warningDesc: The following content contains adult-oriented cosplay galleries and is only suitable for users 18+. Please confirm your age.
nsfw.hidden: NSFW content is hidden. Toggle the switch to browse.

footer.aboutDesc: CosHub is dedicated to collecting and showcasing the world's finest cosplay works, providing a premium visual experience for cosplay enthusiasts.

user.loginRequiredDesc: Please sign in to purchase galleries

subscription.title: Membership
subscription.benefit2: Unlocks and downloads share the quota
subscription.benefit3: 30-day rolling cycle from subscribe date, auto-resets
subscription.successDesc: Your membership is active and monthly quota refreshed.
subscription.quotaUsedUp: Quota used up — buy single galleries or renew

terms.subtitle: By using CosHub, you agree to the following terms of service.

sections.p: Gallery content is owned by the original authors and cosplayers. The platform only provides display and distribution channels — do not repost or commercialize without authorization.
You are responsible for activity under your account and must not upload or distribute illegal, infringing, or immoral content.
Membership quota is provided per subscription cycle. Unlocked galleries remain accessible permanently; virtual goods are non-refundable once unlocked.
We reserve the right to adjust terms and features within reasonable bounds. Material changes will be announced on the site.

privacy.subtitle: This privacy policy explains how CosHub collects, uses, and protects your information.

sections.p: We only collect necessary account and transaction data when you register, subscribe, or purchase galleries, used solely for providing and maintaining the service.
Your information is used for authentication, order processing, quota management, and service notifications. We never sell your personal data.
We use cookies to remember login state and NSFW display preference (local preference only, no personally identifiable content).
You can edit your nickname and avatar in the user center anytime, or contact us to deactivate your account and process related data.

items.a: CosHub is a cosplay gallery sharing community that curates photo sets and themed packs from various works.
Open a gallery's detail page. Paid galleries can be unlocked with a single purchase or downloaded via member quota; some galleries provide external download links (e.g. cloud storage).
Members get a fixed monthly download quota. Unlocks and downloads consume quota, which auto-resets per subscription cycle (30 days).

items.q: How do I view NSFW content?
items.a: Toggle the NSFW switch at the top of the page to browse adult-oriented content. The preference is stored via cookie.

contact.subtitle: We value every user's feedback. Reach us through any of the channels below.

channels.title: Email
channels.hint: For business inquiries and content appeals, email this address.

channels.title: Community
channels.hint: Join the community to connect with other cosplayers and report issues.

channels.title: Social Media
channels.hint: Follow us for the latest galleries and event news.

categories.title: Categories

categories.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this category? Galleries using this category will not be deleted, only the category association will be lost.

galleries.errorTitleZh: Please fill in the Chinese title
galleries.errorSlugFormat: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens
galleries.errorImages: Please upload at least one gallery image
galleries.lazyToolHint: Fill in a title first (Chinese/English/Japanese all work, will be auto-translated to English to generate the Slug); or enter it manually below.
galleries.translateHint: Translation uses the free public MyMemory API; requires network. On failure, falls back to original text — editable manually.
galleries.slugLabel: Slug (URL identifier; click "Auto Slug" to generate from title — Chinese titles are translated to English first; editable)
galleries.nsfwUploadHint: NSFW galleries will be uploaded with nsfw=1

galleries.priceFreeHint: Members only: with no price set, only subscribers can access (cannot be purchased individually)
galleries.externalDownloadLabel: External download URL (cloud storage / external link, optional)
galleries.externalDownloadHint: When set, the detail page's "Download" button will open this external link instead of bundling site images.
galleries.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this gallery?
